'The monsters there left me well enough alone, with the exclusion of one of Nihltet's creations who happened to be around, she was rather curious and adorable. She enjoyed being petted. After we parted ways without a word shared, I went on to collect an assortment of new ingredients.'

'She then began to approach me, I couldn't see her face, which is odd as I can see perfectly in the dark, yet the shadows around her seemed to be thick and obfuscating despite this. I told her to leave me alone, as it was clear she was intending to bother me.'

'I then realized I had lost my basket of ingredients. Under piles of stone. With a sigh, I went back home with a single mushroom that my awakener had found.'

'Once home I started checking into the state of my magical signature and demonic energy- the state of my everything. Everything was fine, with one tiny exclusion, there is a very small mark in my demonic energy signature, my soul, of what seems to be 'Lucidia' demonic energy. 'But looking into it further has shown little evidence to what happened, or who that was. To be frank diary, I'm not even sure it {i}did{/i} happen. And anyone who I have gotten to check my magical signature can't see that mark.'

'My only solace in that this wasn't some hallucination set on by over work, is that Nihltet's creation in there remembers what happened. She was actually stalking me, and clarified that she had seen the cloaked woman as well. With this I have informed both the Umbral Coven, and Nihltet of this occurrence, but with so little information to go on, there's not much we can really do.'

'I really should have caught the name of 'Nihltet's creation', as it is kind of rude for them to be referred to that way. Though I think they were trying to use an unconscious level telepathic spell to tell me her name, I probably should have lowered my telepathic defenses... But I get too much spam Diary, I had reason not to.'

'That aside, I am going to continue monitoring this mark when I have the time, and keep tabs on any events that sound similar. There may be something going on... I really don't want to deal with any of this.'
